target: data/predictions.json — audit all entries, assign our_verdict
finding: Of 94 total entries, 76 already have non-null our_verdict values (recycled, standard_physics, unfalsifiable, refuted, confirmed, etc.). 8 have our_verdict = "pending" (assessed but waiting for test window closure). The remaining 10 null-verdict entries are manual_test (MT-001 through MT-005) and data_watch (DW-001 through DW-006) types with ongoing test windows and no conclusion date — null verdict is the correct state for these items. The curmudgeon note that "All 86 prediction entries have our_verdict=null" was accurate at the time of writing but has since been resolved by prior analyst/decider cycles.
remaining_items: 10 null-verdict items (6 data_watch + 4 manual_test) — all have ongoing test windows. These are correctly null and will be updated when their windows close.
kernel_of_truth: The curmudgeon correctly identified that prediction tab category statistics were blocked by missing verdicts. The verdicts have since been populated.
